data.title: Solar Pool Supply rebrands with focus on lifestyle and sustainability, with new tagline "Bringing Lifestyle to Your Pool."
data.description: Solar Pool Supply has revealed their updated brand strategy, emphasizing lifestyle, sustainability, and enhancing poolside living experiences. The company's new slogan, "Bringing Lifestyle to Your Pool," encapsulates this shift. Along with a fresh visual identity, Solar Pool Supply aims to stay true to their values by renewing their focus on providing high-quality products and services.

data.title: Report by IWSI America reveals how AI can enhance disability employment, with potential for reshaping future work.
data.description: IWSI America, a workforce development organization, recently released a report titled "AI Strategies for Disability Employment" focusing on the use of AI in improving job opportunities for individuals with disabilities. This report comes as AI continues to transform the employment landscape in the United States. The report highlights strategies to leverage AI's advantages in the workforce while also addressing the potential challenges it may present. The publication was made available on February 18, 2026, and it aims to provide valuable insights for both employers and job seekers in utilizing AI technologies effectively. It emphasizes the importance of incorporating AI in disability employment initiatives to maximize its impact.

data.title: Pintuck & Purl to host second 'BERNINA By the Sea' retreat in Newcastle, N.H. for sewing enthusiasts, offering four days of education and creativity.
data.description: A BERNINA Authorized Dealer in Newcastle, New Hampshire, is hosting a four-day event from February 18, 2026, aimed at sewing enthusiasts. Pintuck & Purl, recognized for their encouragement of sewists in New England, will focus on education, community, and creativity during the event.

data.title: DeWys Stainless Solutions in Grand Rapids adds Khulmeyer Stroke Sander for improved quality and efficiency.
data.description: DeWys Stainless Solutions is constantly striving to improve the quality, efficiency, and accuracy of their operations. They have just reached a significant achievement by installing a new Khulmeyer Stroke Sander (Single Belt Grinding Machine, Type EBSC). This addition marks a key milestone for the company, demonstrating their commitment to innovation and advancement in their processes.

data.title: Director of Survivors Voice urges for full release of all names in Epstein files to protect children. #StopTheCircus.
data.description: The head of Survivors Voice, a group dedicated to supporting adult survivors of childhood sexual abuse, is urging for the disclosure of all names in the Epstein files. In Boston on February 18, 2026, the director emphasized the importance of releasing this information to protect children. They stated, "None should be kept secret." This request for transparency aims to hold accountable those involved and safeguard victims.

data.title: New luxury retreat Alila Mayakoba in Quintana Roo, Mexico combines nature, Mayan traditions, and wellbeing. Opening soon in 2026.
data.description: A new resort situated in the heart of nature, showcasing the core values of the Alila brand - a blend of awe-inspiring design, authentic Mayan cultural experiences, and a holistic focus on health. Located in QUINTANA ROO, Mexico, the resort launched on Feb. 18, 2026, under Hyatt Hotels.

data.title: Chews Health introduces DynaMind soft chews for improved brain health, energy, mental clarity & focus.
data.description: Chews Health has introduced their leading product, DynaMind soft chews, which offer a boost of clean energy, mental clarity, and focus without any unwanted side effects like jitters or crashes. Based in San Diego, on February 18, 2026, Chews Health, the manufacturer of DynaMind cacao chews, is emphasizing the importance of brain health through their premium product.

data.title: Massive promotes Maggie Rodney & appoints Matthew Klein as Partners to boost platform expansion. Highlighting firm's growing tech investment strategy.
data.description: Maggie Rodney has been elevated to Partner at Massive, while Matthew Klein has been named as a Partner to reinforce the firm's ongoing platform growth. These leadership changes underscore Massive's increasing momentum in its robust technology investment approach. The announcements were made in Boulder, Colorado, on February 18, 2026.

data.title: NEOGOV, a public sector workforce management platform, named to 2026 GovTech 100 for growth. Calif.-based. Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: NEOGOV, a workforce management platform specialized for the public sector, based in El Segundo, California, was recently honored for its rapid growth. The company's software platform tailored for the public sector was recognized in Feb 18, 2026. They were awarded a spot on the 2026 GovTech list, showcasing innovative companies in the sector. NEOGOV's dedication to creating effective workforce solutions has resulted in significant success, solidifying its position in the industry.

data.title: Frenos launches catalog for IT/OT cybersecurity intelligence; Adversary Intelligence Engine provides transparency into AI analysis of attack paths.
data.description: The recently launched "Adversary Intelligence Engine" Community Edition offers defenders insight into AI's analysis of attack paths within operational technology environments. Provided by Frenos, this tool is the first of its kind in the industry. Released on February 18, 2026, in Fulton, Maryland, this engine allows users to understand how artificial intelligence assesses potential attack routes. This innovative solution provides visibility and helps enhance security measures.
Thai shares rise as much as 1.2%, with the benchmark index hitting 1,483.63 points—the highest since Nov 6, 2024.

data.title: Britax announces new Britax Juniper+ Compact Stroller designed to pair with select infant car seats, enhancing family mobility. #Britax #Stroller #InfantCarSeat
data.description: Britax®, a renowned brand in child safety and mobility, recently unveiled an upgraded version of its award-winning Juniper™ compact stroller in Fort Mill, S.C. The updated stroller is designed to be lightweight and easily portable, making it ideal for parents on the move. It can be paired with specific infant car seats by using separate adapters, which are available for purchase. This new model aims to provide added convenience and flexibility for parents, ensuring their child's safety and comfort while on the go. The announcement was made on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin analyst warns about quantum threat at Hong Kong conference; Tron founder advocates for crypto's readiness.
data.description: During a recent conference in Hong Kong, Justin Sun, the founder of Tron, emphasized the necessity for the cryptocurrency industry to anticipate the advent of artificial general intelligence (AGI). Meanwhile, a prominent Bitcoin analyst warned about the potential threat posed by quantum computing and stressed the importance of factoring this into the valuation of cryptocurrencies. Sun's comments and the analyst's concerns come at a critical time for the industry as it grapples with the intersection of rapidly evolving technology and the future of digital assets. These discussions highlight the need for robust strategies and adaptation within the crypto space as it navigates the complexities of emerging technologies. The insights shared at the conference underscore the ongoing dialogue surrounding the impact of advanced technologies on the cryptocurrency market, urging stakeholders to remain vigilant and proactive in the face of these developments.
Bill Gates to forgo keynote address at AI Summit in Delhi, according to Gates Foundation, to maintain focus on summit priorities.

data.title: FCX extends operating rights in Grasberg Minerals District with Indonesia government, includes life of resource extension for PT Freeport Indonesia.
data.description: In Phoenix, Freeport (NYSE: FCX) revealed an agreement with the Indonesia government for a life of resource extension of operating rights for PT Freeport Indonesia (PTFI) in the Grasberg minerals district. The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) outlines that PTFI's special mining business license (IUPK) will be modified to include a life of resource extension of operating rights. This extension will enhance support for the company's operations.
Top US commander makes surprise visit to Venezuela-scmp
Jose Balcazar gets enough votes to win Peru president vote in Congress, is elected interim president

data.title: Bitcoin's 2-step quantum plan discussed at Longtitude event, as Tron's Justin Sun highlights need for industry readiness.
data.description: At a conference in Hong Kong, Tron creator Justin Sun highlighted that the cryptocurrency sector must ready itself for the emergence of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). Concurrently, a Bitcoin expert cautioned that the potential risks posed by quantum computing should be taken into consideration when evaluating the cryptocurrency market. Sun's remarks shed light on the need for the industry to adapt to advanced technologies, while the analyst's perspective underscores the importance of factoring in quantum threats in market assessments. The juxtaposition of these viewpoints at the conference emphasizes the vital role of anticipating and addressing emerging challenges in the realm of digital currencies.

data.title: Generali Global Assistance named top choice for international travel insurance by Expert Consumers for 2026.
data.description: Generali Global Assistance has been acknowledged as the top choice for travel insurance and assistance for international travel by Expert Consumers in New York on February 18, 2026. The accolade emphasizes their dedication to delivering dependable global coverage and in-house emergency support. The recognition underscores their exceptional services catering to travelers, showcasing their leadership in providing top-notch protection for international trips.
Japanese Yen softens to near 155.00 on hawkish Fed Minutes-fx
